title: cynanchica lilaciflora subsp. mutensis
intro: Cynanchica lilaciflora subsp. mutensis, also known as Mutens Cynanchica, is a rare and endangered plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cynanchica lilaciflora subsp. mutensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
